CustomField.description: A subtask can be billable or non-billable. These distinctions are set as defaults on the subtask. When a subtask's billable, however this specific subtask is not, we would like a rationale for why that is.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: A subtask can be billable or non-billable. These distinctions are set as defaults on the subtask. When a subtask's billable, however this specific subtask is not, we would like a rationale for why that is.
CustomField.label: Reason Billable Status Changed
